name: vean-remotion
comment: remotion/@remotion/cli/@remotion/player/react/react-dom are PINNED to exact versions that MUST match viewer/package.json — the ProRes export (this workspace) and the live @remotion/player preview (viewer) render the same composition, so they must run the same Remotion/React version. `bun run doctor` asserts this parity; do not loosen to a range without keeping both files in lockstep.
